_comment: Topic hints for daily-post.mjs. Seeded 2026-07-05 from GSC content-gap queries (real search demand where itinlending.net ranks pos 70-95). 'flagship' = Monday deep original-data pieces (cluster owners); 'cluster' = Wed/Fri detail posts. Rotated weekly by daily-post.mjs; existingList dedup prevents repeats. Update as GSC reveals new buried-but-real-demand queries.
flagship: ITIN mortgage rates in 2026 and which lenders actually approve ITIN home loans (verified lender list with requirements)
Which banks and lenders approve ITIN auto loans: a verified, state-aware list with rates and requirements
ITIN personal loans ranked: real lenders, rate ranges, and approval odds for no-SSN borrowers
ITIN business loans and SBA options for immigrant entrepreneurs: who actually lends and what they require
